results.content:
import chess, chess.engine
candidates = [
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1',
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w K - 0 1',
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
]
engine_path = '/usr/games/stockfish'
for fen in candidates:
    board = chess.Board(fen)
    print('FEN', fen)
    print('Legal moves', board.legal_moves.count())
    with chess.engine.SimpleEngine.popen_uci(engine_path) as engine:
        info = engine.analyse(board, chess.engine.Limit(depth=18), multipv=5)
    if not isinstance(info, list):
        info = [info]
    for i, entry in enumerate(info, 1):
        score = entry['score'].pov(chess.WHITE)
        pv = entry.get('pv', [])
        print(i, pv[0].uci() if pv else None, score)
    print()
PY

results.content:
import chess
candidates = [
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1',
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w K - 0 1',
    'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1',
]
for fen in candidates:
    board = chess.Board(fen)
    mates = []
    for move in board.legal_moves:
        b = board.copy()
        b.push(move)
        if b.is_checkmate():
            mates.append(move.uci())
    print(fen)
    print('\n'.join(mates) or '(none)')
    print('---')
PY
r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1
e2e4
g2g4
---

import re
from pathlib import Path
import chess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
text = Path('/app/move.txt').read_text().strip().splitlines()
print('lines:', text)
assert text, 'move.txt is empty'
for mv in text:
    assert re.fullmatch(r'[a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?$', mv), mv
    move = chess.Move.from_uci(mv)
    assert move in board.legal_moves, f'illegal: {mv}'
    b = board.copy()
    b.push(move)
    assert b.is_checkmate(), f'not mate: {mv}'
print('verified')
PY
lines: ['e2e4', 'g2g4']
verified
